action_request.notes: Runtime payloads may carry contract_version. M2 governed calls require it through explicit compatibility enforcement.

gate_decision.notes: Per-pack decision contract retained for bounded interchange.

runtime_evaluation_result.notes: Canonical multi-pack kernel result with compatibility, governance, applicability, evaluation, and human-return stages.

requirement_pack.notes: Runtime payloads may carry contract_version. Compatibility does not establish governance eligibility.

requirement_pack_governance.notes: Governance records can now be bound into evaluate_action() for M2 entry calls.
